user.title: Set up ZHA Tuya Quirks
user.description: Click Submit to enable the ZHA Tuya Quirks integration. It registers the bundled ZHA custom quirks for Tuya Zigbee devices. There is nothing to configure here. A Home Assistant restart may be required for the quirks to apply to already-joined devices (re-interrogate or re-pair the device).

abort.already_configured: ZHA Tuya Quirks is already set up.
